heading: Burpengary East vs Burrar Islet — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Burpengary East, Queensland and Burrar Islet, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Burpengary East has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Burrar Islet (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Burpengary East or Burrar Islet safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Burpengary East has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Burrar Islet scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Burpengary East scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Burrar Islet scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Burpengary East or Burrar Islet?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Burpengary East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
